scope_boundary: Refuted for the frozen deterministic KERC proxy on its 192-record authored corpus: held-out Kernel, surface, and simple-handle cores tied at 0.5 while complete packets averaged 714 bytes against a 73.25-byte best simple representation.
transition_reason: The preregistered broad gate required matched fidelity and task quality plus strictly lower complete-system description rate; the packet was almost ten times the best simple representation with no task advantage.
required_artifacts: different learned compilers and native cores
negative_results: 0.5 held-out accuracy for every compared core
downgrade_triggers: refutation generalized beyond this implementation and corpus
promotion_burden: A materially different prospectively frozen implementation may open a new claim identity; this exact implementation/corpus efficiency claim must remain refuted.
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
non_claims: does not refute other KERC implementations, corpora, models, or languages
does not refute exact handles or the isolated glossary break-even
does not promote any chapter core claim
does not establish SOTA, AGI, ASI, publication, release, or deployment readiness
